changeSet.author: hisab-erp
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO permissions (id, code, resource, action, description) VALUES (uuid_generate_v4(), 'customer:write', 'customer', 'write', 'Create, update or deactivate customers'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'payment:write', 'payment', 'write', 'Create, confirm or cancel payments'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'uom:read', 'uom', 'read', 'Read units of measure'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'uom:create', 'uom', 'create','Create or update units of measure') ON CONFLICT (code) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: hisab-erp
